title: Dependency Trace
description: Trace callers, callees, data flow, rendered artifacts, deploy ownership, and provider capability impact before proposing
body: Trace callers, callees, data flow, rendered artifacts, deploy ownership, and provider capability impact before proposing changes. Record exact source ids and generated paths. This skill is used by OAL acceptance and route execution to keep investigation evidence-based and avoid speculative fixes. It must be rendered into provider skill surfaces and referenced by route or agent contracts.
